name: TTArtisan AF 27mm f2.8
description: Featuring an unobtrusive pancake design cameras, this 27mm f/2.8 Lens from TTArtisan is a versatile all-purpose lens for daily use. Well-suited for landscapes, street scenes, portraits, and more, this autofocus lens utilizes an STM stepping motor for quickly capturing those perfect photographic moments.

features.Key Features:: APS-C Format | f/2.8 to f/16 | 40.5mm (Full-Frame Equivalent) | STM Stepping AF Motor | Minimum Focusing Distance: 13.8" | 7-Blade Diaphragm
features.What's In The Box?: TTArtisan 27mm f/2.8 | Front and Rear Lens Caps | Lens Hood
